name: Grape, Bee Pollen and Yogurt
steps: Hydrate the gelatin in ice water.
Once hydrated, dissolve in the cream.
Mix in the yogurt and pass, no charges.
Mix together and store in airtight container.
Using a silpat, spread silpat with the mixture.
Once melted, turn onto another silpat.
Heat again in microwave and pull to make shards.
Store in air tight container with silica gel.
